id.description: Unique identifier for the app run (UUID in RFC 4122 format)

appId.description: ID of the app this run belongs to

state.description: Current state of the app run

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the app run was created (ISO 8601 ATOM format)

startedAt.description: Timestamp when the app run started (ISO 8601 ATOM format)

stoppedAt.description: Timestamp when the app run stopped (ISO 8601 ATOM format)

startupLogs.description: Startup logs from the app run

runtimeSize.description: Runtime size used for this app run (e.g., small, medium, large)

configVersion.description: Configuration version used for this app run

failureReason.description: User-facing cause of a failed run. Set only when state is "failed".

reason.description: Short, stable, machine-readable identifier (UI i18n key)

mode.description: Run mode this app run was started with
